title: The Halloween Costume
synopsis: A child worries about a homemade costume until the night turns out better than expected.
sentences: For Halloween, Arlo wanted to wear the best costume in the street.
But two days before the party, the costume he ordered still had not arrived.
Arlo felt upset and sat quietly at the kitchen table.
His mother opened a cupboard full of old clothes, fabric, and buttons.
Together they made a pirate costume with a striped shirt, a scarf, and a paper hat.
Arlo looked at himself in the mirror and was surprised.
The costume was not perfect, but it had character.
That evening, he joined his friends at the school hall.
One child dressed as a ghost, another as a wizard, and another as a pumpkin.
Many people smiled at Arlo's pirate hat and toy map.
By the end of the night, he had won a small prize for the funniest costume.
Arlo learned that sometimes a handmade plan can be the best one of all.
